_comment: EDITOR fire restrictions — fallback + override for the auto-detected SJNF stage. The worker now auto-reads the current stage from the official San Juan NF alerts pages (precedence: override ▸ live SJNF parse ▸ last-good ▸ this file). Set "override": true to FORCE this file's values (e.g. if the parse is wrong or fs.usda.gov is down); leave it false to let auto-detection win and keep these fields as the fallback. Set stage to none|1|2. When stage is 'none' the prohibited/allowed/penalty/scope/effective are ignored. See docs/FIRE-RESTRICTIONS-AUTO.md, docs/FIRE-RESTRICTIONS.md, worker/README.md.
scope: All San Juan National Forest lands (forest-wide), including Vallecito Lake — Forest Order 02-13-00-26-05
summary: No campfires, charcoal, or wood/coal stove fires; no outdoor smoking. Propane/gas stoves with shut-off OK. Forest-wide as of June 12, 2026.
prohibited: Outdoor smoking (except in a vehicle or building)
allowed: Propane/gas stoves & lanterns with shut-off valves
Fires in permanent Forest Service campfire rings in developed sites
penalty: Class B misdemeanor — up to $5,000 (individuals) / $10,000 (organizations) and/or up to 6 months
